name: Red Robin
short_description: There is a place that seems to be invisible, no one can find it, and no signal can be sent from it. "Red Bird", tells of a stranger with endless problems in life and work on a rainy night. Because of an accidental car accident, accidentally found a deep forest where no one knew Houses.
detailed_description:
\ HELP! /



There is a place that seems invisible, no one can find it, and no signal can be sent from it.

"Red Bird", tells of a stranger with endless problems in life and work on a rainy night. Because of an accidental car accident, accidentally found a deep forest where no one knew Houses.
And this place seems to be very consistent with a thing he has recently known...

About the game

  • Plot-oriented pixel style game, the gameplay includes some elements such as exploration, puzzle solving, and collection

  • Original art materials

  • Double ending, and the content of the ending is completely different, the duration of a week is 2-3 hours

  • Content-rich branch lines, some branch lines need to meet the collection conditions to open

  • The operation method is recommended to use the z key to confirm and investigate, the x key to cancel and open the menu, the arrow keys ↑ ↓ → ←to move, the running arrow key +Shift, F4 full screen

Some guides are visible in the local folder of the game.
